Absence of certifications or organic claims may limit appeal to strict health-conscious buyers but aligns with a 'natural gourmet' market segment.

Bullet Point 2: 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐞: This is a freeze dried instant coffee with 40% less caffeine than a regular cup of coffee and can be made hot or cold.
